message:
feat(fnp-python): nested fnp_python.polynomial subpackages (crid)

Expose fnp_python.polynomial.{polynomial, chebyshev, legendre, hermite,
hermite_e, laguerre} as nested submodules re-exporting numpy's real
subpackages. Extends the polynomial submodule's PEP-562 __getattr__ to
recognize both the 6 class names (Polynomial/Chebyshev/Legendre/Hermite/
HermiteE/Laguerre) and the 6 subpackage names, and adds eager setattr
of each subpackage when numpy.polynomial is importable at module init.

Result: user code written against numpy.polynomial canonical paths —
e.g. numpy.polynomial.chebyshev.chebadd — works verbatim via
fnp_python.polynomial.chebyshev.chebadd, routing through numpy's
real subpackage. Identity-equivalence (ours.is(theirs)) is asserted.

Parity test polynomial_namespace_exposes_nested_subpackages covers
all 6 subpackages and round-trips a chebadd call through the nested
path.

Part of franken_numpy-0247.
br-franken_numpy-crid
